stages.label: Set Pages runtime secrets
stages.command: Set Cloudflare Pages environment variables: APIFOOTBALL_KEY, FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN, ODDS_API_KEY, FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL, FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, ALLOW_ORIGIN
stages.detail: APIFOOTBALL_KEY is missing for same-origin /data-proxy enrichment. FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN is missing for proxied Football-Data.org matches and standings. FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL is missing. FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN is missing for same-origin /seal token injection.

stages.label: Authenticate Cloudflare deploy
stages.detail: Set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, or run bunx wrangler login and set CLOUDFLARE_WRANGLER_LOGIN=1.

stages.label: Deploy app and same-origin backend routes
stages.detail: Complete Functions, runtime secrets and Cloudflare auth before deploying the same-origin backend routes.

Commands:
- bun run pages:functions:build
- bun run pages:cf:check
- bun run pages:cf:deploy

- Same-origin Filecoin seal health: curl -sS 'https://kickoff-lock-agent.pages.dev/seal/health'

- Authenticate Cloudflare deploy [blocked]
